message:
fix(messaging): prevent desynced Redis connection from returning to pool

The Redis Pipeline::exec() method writes commands and reads responses
on a pooled connection. If the future was dropped mid-protocol-exchange
(e.g., by task cancellation), the PooledResource's Drop would return
the desynced connection to the pool. The next user of that connection
would read stale responses or encounter protocol errors.

Fix: wrap the connection in a DiscardOnDropGuard that calls discard()
on drop. The guard is defused only when the entire pipeline exchange
completes successfully, ensuring the connection is returned to the
pool only in a clean state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
